reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Splitwise
reauth_confirm.description: The Splitwise integration needs to re-authenticate your account.

abort.already_in_progress: Configuration flow is already in progress
abort.oauth_unauthorized: OAuth authorization error while obtaining access token
abort.missing_configuration: The Splitwise integration is not configured. Please follow the documentation to set up Application Credentials.

application_credentials.description: To link your Splitwise account, register an application at the [Splitwise Developer portal](https://secure.splitwise.com/apps). Set the Callback URL to `https://my.home-assistant.io/redirect/oauth`. Splitwise will give you a **Consumer Key** and **Consumer Secret** — enter the Consumer Key in the Client ID field below, and the Consumer Secret in the Client Secret field.

deprecated_yaml.title: Splitwise YAML configuration is deprecated
deprecated_yaml.description: Splitwise no longer supports YAML sensor configuration. Remove the `sensor: - platform: splitwise` block from configuration.yaml and delete any leftover `splitwise.conf` token file, then set up Splitwise via Settings > Devices & Services > Add Integration.
